evals.name: ship-ready-full-review
evals.prompt: Is this checkout flow ship-ready? Grade it like Apple would.
evals.expected_output: Loads .ultra.md if present, runs slop gate, discovery, weighted rounds, P0/P1 findings, A-D grade, SHIP/ITERATE/REJECT verdict.

evals.name: quick-scan-mid-iteration
evals.prompt: Quick review of the settings page — I'm iterating fast.
evals.expected_output: Quick scan mode: slop gate, A-F grade, top 3 issues only, no full 67-item ledger.

evals.name: accessibility-audit
evals.prompt: Run an accessibility audit on the booking form — WCAG 2.2 AA.
evals.expected_output: A11y deep mode or R4 with criterion-level failures, code fixes, contrast checks.

evals.name: trigger-should-design-critique
evals.prompt: review my design — does this look professional?

evals.name: trigger-should-not-pr-ship
evals.prompt: PR ready? check migrations and npm run verify
